code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    if not triples:
        return ""
    # Group triples by subject to allow multiple entities
    from collections import defaultdict
    subject_map = defaultdict(list)
    for t in triples:
        subject_map[t.subject].append(t)

    # Simple predicate → phrase templates
    # Helper to clean and format object values
    def _clean(obj: str) -> str:
        obj = obj.strip().strip('"')
        # If numeric, drop trailing .0 and add commas
        try:
            if "." in obj:
                num = float(obj)
                if num.is_integer():
                    obj = f"{int(num):,}"
                else:
                    obj = f"{num:,}"
            else:
                # integer string, add commas
                num = int(obj.replace(",", ""))
                obj = f"{num:,}"
        except Exception:
            pass
        return obj

    # Refined predicate → phrase templates that place the subject in a natural position
    templates = {
        # Airport‑specific predicates
        "cityServed": "The city served by {subject} is {obj}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "The elevation of {subject} is {obj} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": "The elevation of {subject} is {obj} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": "The elevation of {subject} is {obj} feet above sea level",
        "runwayLength": "The runway length of {subject} is {obj}",
        "runwayName": "The runway name of {subject} is {obj}",
        "location": "{subject} is located in {obj}",
        "operatingOrganisation": "{subject} is operated by {obj}",
        "country": "{subject} is in {obj}",
        "isPartOf": "{subject} is part of {obj}",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": "The ICAO location identifier of {subject} is {obj}",
        "locationIdentifier": "The location identifier of {subject} is {obj}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": "The IATA location identifier of {subject} is {obj}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "The first runway of {subject} is {obj} feet long",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": "The first runway of {subject} is {obj} metres long",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": "The surface of the first runway at {subject} is {obj}",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "The number of the first runway at {subject} is {obj}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": "The runway surface at {subject} is {obj}",
        # Added/adjusted predicates
        "jurisdiction": "{subject} has jurisdiction in {obj}",
        # Generic entity predicates
        "leader": "{subject}'s leader is {obj}",
        "capital": "{subject}'s capital is {obj}",
        "language": "{subject}'s language is {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": "{subject}'s official language is {obj}",
        "currency": "{subject}'s currency is {obj}",
        "owner": "{subject} is owned by {obj}",
        "foundingYear": "{subject} was founded in {obj}",
        "founder": "{subject} was founded by {obj}",
        "postalCode": "The postal code of {subject} is {obj}",
        "areaCode": "The area code of {subject} is {obj}",
        "largestCity": "The largest city of {subject} is {obj}",
        "countySeat": "The county seat of {subject} is {obj}",
        "mayor": "The mayor of {subject} is {obj}",
        "leaderParty": "The leader party of {subject} is {obj}",
        "leaderTitle": "The leader title of {subject} is {obj}",
        "chief": "The chief of {subject} is {obj}",
        "hubAirport": "The hub airport of {subject} is {obj}",
        "regionServed": "{subject} serves the region {obj}",
        "nativeName": "The native name of {subject} is {obj}",
        # Biological classification predicates
        "class": "The class of {subject} is {obj}",
        "division": "The division of {subject} is {obj}",
        "order": "The order of {subject} is {obj}",
        "species": "The species of {subject} is {obj}",
        "demonym": "The demonym of {subject} is {obj}",
    }

    sentences = []
    for subject, tlist in subject_map.items():
        parts = []
        for t in tlist:
            tmpl = templates.get(t.predicate)
            obj = _clean(t.object)
            if tmpl:
                parts.append(tmpl.format(subject=subject, obj=obj))
            else:
                # Fallback generic phrase preserving subject
                pred = t.predicate.replace('_', ' ')
                parts.append(f"{subject} {pred} {obj}")
        # Combine parts into a fluent sentence (use semicolons for multiple facts)
        if parts:
            if len(parts) == 1:
                sentence = parts[0] + "."
            else:
                sentence = "; ".join(parts) + "."
            sentences.append(sentence)

    return " ".join(sentences)

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
